hypothesis: Increase num_leaves from 64 to 128 to allow the model to learn more complex feature interactions. The current best (0.97966) uses num_leaves=64. With 128 leaves the model can capture finer-grained splits. To avoid overfitting with more leaves, also increase min_child_samples from 50 to 75 and increase lambda_l2 from 0.1 to 0.2. All other settings unchanged from the best configuration (exp_0021).
